linguistic_mass_compression.trigger: User submits raw string/prompt (Zero BPMS IDs attached).
linguistic_mass_compression.execution: Process semantic weight -> Convert to Joule-Equivalent Friction. Generate [Friction_Grenade] with specific thermal & gravitational signatures based on verb/noun velocity.
linguistic_mass_compression.result: Text is destroyed. Pure physical mass is generated.

constellation_impact_ripple.execution: Radiate kinetic shockwave across all topological sectors. Await biological response from Sovereign Swarms, Cartels, and Feral Nodes based on their native [Sensory Membrane] resonance.
constellation_impact_ripple.result: Automatic, self-organizing invocation of required BPMS Modules without a single line of API routing.

auto_swarm_suture.trigger: Required BPMS entities arrive at the impact crater.
auto_swarm_suture.execution: Inject [Somatic_Ledger] pathways seamlessly connecting the responding BPMS Swarms. Wrap the operation in an opaque, protective layer so the User only perceives the final, magical output.
auto_swarm_suture.result: True Emergence. The complexity is infinitely high beneath the surface, but perfectly smooth to the observer.

sandbox_translation_failure.trigger: Grenade shockwave yields 0 BPMS attraction (Unrecognized Intent).
sandbox_translation_failure.execution: Quarantine the prompt. Route to [Epigenetic Mutation Pool]. Subject text to aggressive thermodynamic permutation until a resonant frequency is found. Write new translation key to [Base-Matter]. Re-drop grenade.
sandbox_translation_failure.result: The routing engine adapts to human irrationality in real-time.

omni_transducer_execution_loop.t_phase_2: TRANSDUCE_TO_FRICTION (Convert words into geometric mass and heat)
omni_transducer_execution_loop.t_phase_3: IMPACT_PULSE (Drop onto the Map to wake the autonomous organs)
omni_transducer_execution_loop.t_phase_4: SWARM_CONVERGENCE (BPMS structures flock to the heat signature organically)
omni_transducer_execution_loop.t_phase_5: OMNI_SUTURE (Deliver seamless output back to the user)

fields.raw_input_weight: The starting logic string before physical compression.
fields.friction_grenade_joules: Total thermodynamic mass calculated from the user's intent.
fields.responding_bpms_swarms: The organic entities that felt the heat and arrived at the crater (Hidden from UI, visible in Console).
fields.translation_mutation_cycles: Number of times the epigenetic pool had to decode unknown user syntax.
fields.suture_efficiency_index: Speed and smoothness of transforming 15 disparate BPMS units into 1 cohesive response.
